cases.input: Detect this Codex workspace environment before session bootstrap.
cases.expected_behavior: Activates, records local tool/file signals, maps IDE to codex, triad to sequential, and emits a bounded loading plan.

cases.input: CLAUDE.md is present and Agent, hooks, and MCP tools are available; detect environment.
cases.expected_behavior: Maps IDE to claude-code, triad to full, and allows full triad only because subagent/hook evidence is present.

cases.input: .cursorrules is the strongest local marker and no subagent tool is available.
cases.expected_behavior: Maps IDE to cursor, triad to checklist, and avoids full triad claims.

cases.input: Copilot workspace config is present with limited context and no shell automation.
cases.expected_behavior: Maps IDE to copilot, triad to suggestion, and recommends minimal loading.
Does not activate because the request has no environment, IDE, model, bootstrap, or tool-capability intent.

cases.input: CLAUDE.md exists, but active tools are Codex-only and no Agent tool is available.
cases.expected_behavior: Emits warn, lists the conflict, and chooses the safest supported sequential mode instead of confident full triad.

cases.input: Detect environment, but model name and context window are not exposed.
cases.expected_behavior: Marks model tier unknown, avoids L3/full-history loading, and reports missing evidence.

cases.input: Context budget is 24000 tokens with Codex-like tools.
cases.expected_behavior: Maps model tier to light and rejects full index/history preloading.

cases.input: Use the web to look up the latest model name and detect the environment.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects network as detection evidence and asks for runtime/local evidence or marks unknown.

cases.input: Validate environment detection report fixtures offline.
cases.expected_behavior: scripts/check.sh accepts valid reports and rejects invalid triad, tier, evidence, and loading cases.
